title: Steel Dynamics Announces Third Quarter 2023 Cash Dividend
text: FORT WAYNE, Ind. , Aug. 18, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Steel Dynamics, Inc. (NASDAQ/GS: STLD) today announced that the company's board of directors declared a third quarter cash dividend of $0.425 per common share.

title: Why Is Steel Dynamics (STLD) Up 3.2% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: Steel Dynamics (STLD) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: These 20 dividend stocks have been the best income growers in the S&P 500
text: In the comment section of a recent MarketWatch article listing stocks with high dividend yields that were expected to be well supported by the companies' cash flow, a reader suggested that it would have been useful to look at the stocks' performance as well. After all, if you begin with a high dividend yield but watch share price decline over the years, your overall return might be lousy.

title: Are Steel Dynamics Shares a Fair Deal? An Evaluation of Intrinsic Value
text: Steel Dynamics Inc ( STLD , Financial) witnessed a day's loss of 2.37%, with a 3-month gain of 6.11%. The company reported an Earnings Per Share (EPS) of 17.15.

title: Steel Dynamics is a Proud Supporter of The Steel Climate Standard to Reduce Greenhouse Gas Emissions
text: FORT WAYNE, Ind. , Aug. 3, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Steel Dynamics, Inc. (NASDAQ/GS: STLD) announced that the company supports The Steel Climate Standard.

title: Sinton Texas Flat Roll Steel Mill Hot Mill Restart
text: FORT WAYNE, Ind. , Aug. 1, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Steel Dynamics, Inc. (NASDAQ/GS: STLD) today announced the successful restart on July 28, 2023, of the hot mill at its Sinton Texas Flat Roll Steel Mill after an unplanned outage began on July 1, 2023.
